faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common in Glen Oaks yards and gardens?
faqs.answer: Yes, Glen Oaks' suburban setting with mature trees, gardens, and green spaces makes it attractive to yellow jackets. They often build nests underground in lawns, inside wall voids, under eaves, and in attics. Late summer and early fall see the highest activity levels when colonies reach peak size.

faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during yellow jacket removal.
